summary: No command injection, SQL injection, path traversal, or hardcoded secrets. No user input handling — the module delegates entirely to analyze_layer1(). The ToolState and InteractiveState dataclasses are pure data containers. Exception handling returns a safe fallback Layer1Result without exposing internal error details (only str(e) in raw_analysis field, which is internal).

prompt_injection.note: No user input reaches this module's code paths
